title: Canonical Cohort Ledger
description: One record per cohort code across its full lifecycle, joining historical actuals (completed) with forward projections (in-flight). The cash foundation: total pipeline value = booked revenue (actual starts) + projected revenue (in-flight). Built by ledger/build_ledger.py.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the build.

snapshot_date.description: The projection snapshot date the in-flight rows came from (YYYY-MM-DD).

revenue_per_start.description: Blended revenue per start; sourced from scripts/views.REVENUE_PER_START.

cohort.description: Cohort code, the join key, e.g. UDT566, NDT566NC.

program.description: Canonical program label, derived from the cohort code via utils.program_for_cohort.

lifecycle.description: completed = has actual starts; in_flight = currently enrolling with projections; future = known start date, not yet enrolling.

actual_starts.description: Actual started count (completed only). Authoritative source: projection/completed/cohort_actuals.csv.

currently_enrolled.description: Current enrollment (in-flight only), from the projection snapshot.

reconciliation.description: Cross-check of completed actuals against the historical summary (summary_*.csv). Present for completed cohorts that also appear in the historical summary.

v2_starts.description: Starts per the historical dashboard's summary (Active+Drop+Grad definition).

matches.description: True when v2_starts equals actual_starts (Active-only definition).

totals.description: Roll-ups across the ledger — the cash headline seed.

booked_starts.description: Sum of actual_starts across completed cohorts.

booked_revenue.description: Sum of booked_revenue across completed cohorts.

projected_mid_starts.description: Sum of proj_mid across in-flight cohorts.

projected_mid_revenue.description: Sum of projected_revenue_mid across in-flight cohorts.

combined_mid_revenue.description: booked_revenue + projected_mid_revenue — total pipeline cash, mid case.

reconciliation_warnings.description: Completed cohorts where the Active-only actuals disagree with the historical summary's Active+Drop+Grad starts. Surfaces the starts-definition fork that step 6 (ingestion dedup) will resolve.
